column1: I left the box of _____ at home. (match)
Have you ever met a friend of _____ ? (she)
Why was it much _____ to travel by sea? (easy)
Do you know when the _____ train leaves? (one)
That is _____ pencil, and the ruler is _____ , too. (I, I)
The bike doesn't belong to _____ , it's _____ . (he, we)
Did she say that in a _____ way? (polite)
